goal: create a script or system that gets a summary of my twitter list and sends it to my gmail every hour

unresolvedBlocking.description: Twitter API rate limits could prevent the script from running every hour.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Implement exponential backoff for retries and monitor usage via Twitter’s API dashboard.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Authentication failures (expired or revoked tokens) will break the script.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Store tokens securely (e.g., encrypted environment variables) and implement token refresh logic.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Changes in Twitter’s API response format could break the script.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Use versioned API endpoints and add version checks in the code.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Gmail may flag the email as spam or block automated sends.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Use a verified sender address and configure Gmail’s "Less Secure Apps" setting (if necessary).

unresolvedBlocking.description: Storing API keys in plaintext could lead to unauthorized access.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Use environment variables or a secrets manager (e.g., AWS Secrets Manager) for credentials.
